name: He Possesses the World's Most Brilliant Mind
effect: [Main] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Egghead} type card other than [He Possesses the World's Most Brilliant Mind] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

exclude.nameExact: He Possesses the World's Most Brilliant Mind
